allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add Firebase connection test to MainActivity

Initializes Firebase via Crashlytics SDK, logs a test message and
custom key, and displays connection status \(project name or error\) on screen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add Firebase crash auto-fix GitHub Actions pipeline

Workflow detects a Firebase Crashlytics crash \(via workflow_dispatch or
repository_dispatch webhook\), creates a fix branch, uses Claude to analyze
the stacktrace and apply a code fix, verifies the build compiles, commits,
and opens a PR back to the base branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
